chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-180 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objection. 2. For orders on CMA No.819/2022 (Ex/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 22.09.2025 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for petitioner, under instructions does not press the instant petition. Accordingly, instant petition is hereby dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
